summary: Client OS v1 refactor — comprehensive frontend test via Expo web preview (mobile viewport 390x844). Logged in as client@atlas.dev via /api/auth/login (cookie). Verified all 12 requested flows. 11 PASS, 1 FAIL (support tickets endpoint 404). No double navigation. Decision Hub renders the pending_approval deliverable and routes to /client/projects/{id}. Approve/Reject buttons present for del_bc15e47b42c6 on proj_198bb53b6f37. Header is 'EVA-X' + avatar only — no 'Client' title, no CLIENT badge.

critical.issue: Returns 404 Not Found — endpoint missing. Blocks Profile → Support sheet from ever listing the 3 seeded tickets. '+ New' ticket POST to /api/client/support/tickets almost certainly also 404s for the same reason.

integration_issues.flow: Profile → Support → list tickets / create ticket
integration_issues.issue: GET /api/client/support/tickets returns 404 → support sheet is permanently empty ('No tickets yet'). Frontend swallows the error silently (catch → empty array). Task requires 3 seeded tickets to render and '+ New' to create via POST /api/client/support/tickets.

action_items: Implement GET /api/client/support/tickets (return {tickets:[...]}) and POST /api/client/support/tickets on backend. Seeded tickets exist in mock_seed.py but no router exposes them — verify seed actually writes to db and add the missing FastAPI routes.
Minor expectation mismatch: task says 6 invoices, seed currently surfaces 7 (includes a draft estimate). Not a bug — flag to confirm whether additional draft is intended.
critical_code_review_comments: profile.tsx: errors from loadTickets are silently swallowed (catch → setTickets([])). Consider surfacing a toast / error state so 404s don't look like 'empty' legitimately.
activity.tsx row uses onTouchEnd for navigation — works on web but is not the RN idiomatic handler. Prefer Pressable/TouchableOpacity with onPress for consistency across native + web.

home.tsx & decision-hub.tsx both poll /client/pending-deliverables and /client/operator on intervals (15s / implicit). When the Home screen is mounted alongside DecisionHub, there are redundant pollers for the same data. Consider a shared cache hook.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seed (client@atlas.dev). Did NOT exercise live Approve mutation to preserve del_bc15e47b42c6 for subsequent runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login: POST /api/auth/login {email:'client@atlas.dev', password:'client123'} via page.evaluate with credentials:'include'. Navigate to /client/home, /client/projects, /client/projects/proj_198bb53b6f37 (has pending_approval del_bc15e47b42c6 → approve/reject testIDs), /client/activity, /client/billing, /client/profile. L0 tabs confirmed hidden on /client/*. To retest support tickets after backend fix: open Profile, tap profile-row-support, expect >=1 ticket-* testID.
rca_of_issue: Support tickets sheet empty: curl GET /api/client/support/tickets with valid session cookie returns HTTP 404 {"detail":"Not Found"}. Backend router for /api/client/support/tickets is not registered in server.py even though seed data (mock_seed.py) creates tickets. Fix: add the FastAPI route (GET list + POST create) and ensure it reads from the same collection the seed writes to. Verify path: search server.py for 'support/tickets' — likely missing or mounted under a different prefix. Verified reproducible via direct curl + via UI Profile→Support flow.
